title: Assoella purpurascens
taxonomy: Assoella purpurascens is classified within the family Ascoideaceae. It belongs to the phylum Ascomycota, which is a group of fungi characterized by the production of ascospores. Ascoella purpurascens is a species of lichenicolous fungus, meaning it grows on lichens. The genus Ascoella is a group of fungi that are typically lichenicolous and are found in various parts of the world. This species is often found on the lichen genus Lecidea.
